documentation.description:
Precomputed twiddle factors for the 256-point NTT over
Z_q[X]/(X^256 + 1) with q = 8 380 417.

zeta_i = 1753^br(i) * 2^32 mod q, centered to [-(Q-1)/2, (Q-1)/2].

Index 0 is unused by the NTT (k starts at 1 in both forward and
inverse sweeps); we store 0 there to match the pq-crystals reference
byte-for-byte. Max |zeta| in this table is 4_108_315, well below
(Q-1)/2 = 4_190_208, so a tighter type bound (Zeta_Type) below is
sufficient for SPARK product-bound proofs.
